output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez purchased promotional literature for $7,000 cash. Although the materials will be displayed in the sales department for customer reference, they constitute advertising and promotional expenditure. Under IAS 38.69, such expenditure must be recognized as an expense when incurred and cannot be capitalized as an asset. The transaction involves one expense increase (Advertising and Promotional Expense) and one asset decrease (Cash). No tax is mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are added.
